content.problemStatement:
You are given an assignment from your institute.

Each assignment has a difficulty value between 111 and 100100100 (both inclusive).

AI can solve an assignment if and only if the difficulty of the assignment is **less than or equal to**  606060.

Your current assignment has difficulty XXX.

Is AI capable of solving your assignment?

Print `"YES"` if it is, and `"NO"` if it isn't (without the quotes).


Input Format

The first and only line of input will contain a single integer XXX, denoting the difficulty of your assignment.


Output Format

If AI is capable of solving your assignment output `"YES"`, otherwise print `"NO"` (without quotes).

Each character of the output may be printed in either uppercase or lowercase, i.e, the strings `no`, `NO`, `No`, and `nO` will all be treated as equivalent.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The difficulty of the assignment is ≤60\leq 60≤60, so AI can solve it.

Explanation:
The difficulty of the assignment is ≤60\leq 60≤60, so AI can solve it.

Explanation:
The difficulty of the assignment is >60\gt 60>60, so AI cannot solve it.
